label: Web Media Downloader
description: Download authorized web-hosted images, videos, audio, thumbnails, galleries, and dynamically loaded media, then return local artifact paths.

inputSchema.label: URLs
inputSchema.description: One or more page or direct media URLs. Accepts newline-separated, comma-separated, or JSON array input.

inputSchema.label: Media Types
inputSchema.description: Comma-separated types: image, video, audio, or all. Defaults to image,video,audio.

inputSchema.label: Max Items
inputSchema.description: Maximum media files to download. Defaults to 100 and is capped at 500.

inputSchema.label: Discover Only
inputSchema.description: When true, returns discovered media without downloading files.

inputSchema.label: Use Playwright
inputSchema.description: When true, renders pages with the bundled Playwright discovery helper after static discovery.

inputSchema.label: Use yt-dlp
inputSchema.description: When true, attempts yt-dlp downloads into the artifact directory for input URLs.

inputSchema.label: Timeout Seconds
inputSchema.description: HTTP timeout per request. Defaults to 30 seconds.

outputSchema.label: Summary
outputSchema.description: Compact execution summary with output location.

outputSchema.label: Discovered Count
outputSchema.description: Number of media URLs discovered after filtering.

outputSchema.label: Downloaded Count
outputSchema.description: Number of media files successfully written to local artifacts.

outputSchema.label: Downloaded Files
outputSchema.description: Downloaded media records with source URL, kind, filename, local_path, size, and content_type.

outputSchema.label: Paths File
outputSchema.description: Local artifact path to a text file listing downloaded local paths.

outputSchema.label: Manifest File
outputSchema.description: Local artifact path to the JSONL download manifest.

outputSchema.label: Warnings
outputSchema.description: Non-fatal warnings such as optional tool availability.

outputSchema.label: Error
outputSchema.description: Error message when status is failed.
